title: tecoma serratifolia
intro: Tecoma serratifolia, also known as Horse Fennel or Wild Fennel, is a tropical plant belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to India and Southeast Asia. Its leaves, stems, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tecoma serratifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and treat digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
